notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford. Andrew Benintendi scores. Colson Montgomery scores.

notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero flies out to left fielder Brandon Marsh.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk grounds into a double play, shortstop Trea Turner to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Chase Meidroth out at 2nd. Randal Grichuk out at 1st.
